summary: Decision detail flow on /decisions/[decisionId]: 5-step guided stepper (why → analytics → inputs → preview → approve) with Vietnamese labels, mock analytics/inputs/preview, scroll restoration on back, and reuse of useOperationsApproval + #181 executor routing.

interfaceChanges.description: 5-step guided approve flow with step graph, mock forms, and executor modals.
Pure step navigation helpers for detail flow.
Dynamic route opened from Recommended Review links.

mappings.criterion: Review on Recommended card opens detail flow for decisionId
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_issue196_decision_detail.test.tsx::Review on Recommended card links to the decision detail route

mappings.criterion: All 5 steps navigable forward/back with visible step indicator
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_issue196_decision_detail.test.tsx::renders five-step indicator and navigates forward and back

mappings.criterion: Step 5 approve triggers same executor routing as #181
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_issue196_decision_detail.test.tsx::approve npl on step 5 opens listing modal (#181 routing)

mappings.criterion: Unit/integration test step graph and approve from step 5 invokes executor mock
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_issue196_decision_detail.test.ts::navigates forward through the full step graph

mappings.criterion: Vietnamese copy for step labels and CTAs
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_issue196_decision_detail.test.tsx::shows Vietnamese step labels in the indicator
